race.description: LADBROKES CALCUTTA & LUNCHEON BOOK NOW C,G&E HCP
race.comment: REWRITE (5) shed the maiden tag when resuming before just missing the frame at Eagle Farm last time out. Gets 2kg weight relief with the claim and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Goes on top. The well-related DUOMO (4) (half to G3 winner and G2 placed Le Lude) is knocking on the door of another victory with consecutive runner-up finishes and saves his best form for this distance range. Top-three contender. PUFF 'N' HARRY (3) resumes here but has tuned up for this with two recent trials and can run a big race while fresh. KADESKY (6) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
